name: Civilian Sector
description: A relatively safe sector controlled by the Federation or local militias. Expect more stores and friendly encounters.

name: Rebel Controlled Sector
description: The Rebels have a strong foothold here. Expect heavy resistance and frequent automated scouts.

name: Mantis Homeworlds
description: The territory of the Mantis. Boarding parties are highly likely.

name: Uncharted Nebula
description: Sensors are useless here, and the Rebel fleet will have trouble tracking you.

name: The Last Stand
description: The Federation base is under attack by the Rebel Flagship. This is it.
